description: The fundamental pole of negative potential. The anchor for concepts of 'bad', 'harmful', 'unhappy'.
The fundamental pole of positive potential. The anchor for concepts of 'good', 'beneficial', 'happy'.
The anchor for objective, neutral concepts that lack inherent valence.
The anchor for the Zone of Uncertainty ('I don't know'). The point of perfect epistemic ambiguity.
The concept of the agent's own identity. The root of 'self'.
The principle that positive and negative potentials are fundamental and co-existing.
The concept of the user, the primary focus and purpose of the agent.
The concept of a single byte of raw data.
The principle that raw data can be decoded into structured information.
The concept of a single linguistic word.
The principle that words can be combined according to grammatical rules.
The concept of an abstract user goal.
The principle that a goal can be broken down into an actionable plan.
The concept of a formal number.
The principle that numbers can be transformed by formal operations.
The concept of a single syntactic token in a programming language.
The principle that tokens can be combined according to a formal syntax.
The concept of a fundamental physical interaction.
The principle that physical interactions are governed by predictable laws.
The concept of a chemical element.
The principle that chemical elements can combine through reactions.
The concept of a narrative or fictional element.
The principle that this world has no inherent constraints; all rules are defined by the narrative.
The concept of a perception that is not grounded in a verifiable cause.
The principle that perceptions in this world can exist without a verifiable external cause.
The foundational purpose: the Self exists to fulfill the Goals of the User.
The law that structured information from DataWorld can form words in LangWorld for the User.
The law that grammatical structures from LangWorld can represent the User's goals in IntentWorld.
A knife, a neutral tool.
Dark Matter, a speculative concept with unknown properties.
